supportingFiles.note: Native replacements for the lodash helpers the config pipeline relied on (defaultsDeep, defaults, get, omit, each, compact, uniq, cloneDeep via structuredClone). Not a [MUST] item itself; supports configure/validate.

Config slice entrypoint. Re-exports the presets + pipeline and provides withDefaultConfig/withTestConfig/preflight equivalents (source: index.js, lib/amqp/Broker.js preflight = compose(validate, configure)) so the later API slice can wire them.

notes: Full TypeScript rewrite (strict mode passes `tsc --noEmit`). Dependency modernization applied: lodash deep helpers -> structuredClone + small native helpers; uuid@8 -> crypto.randomUUID; xregexp -> native named-group regex; safe-json-parse not needed in this slice. Functional equivalence verified with an equivalence harness diffing the original lib/config (lodash/uuid/xregexp) against the compiled rebuild across 17 fixtures (normalized config shapes modulo random UUID/connection-index, plus exact validation error messages) — all matched. Two latent source no-ops were preserved faithfully (validate.js:26 `_.get(vhost)` management-attr check and validate.js:160 `_.get(config,'config.redeliveries.counters')`), with explanatory comments.
